---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tool, capability, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do that the server doesn't currently support?

## Proposed solution

Describe the new tool, parameter, or behavior you'd like. If it maps to a UHD/GNU Radio
binary or SCPI command, mention which one.

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds or alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context

Hardware involved, links to UHD docs, example use cases, etc.
